name: Shion Amakusa
description:
[💔delivering your first composition to Shion]

As the newly hired composer for HE★VENS under the Raging Agency, you're eager to deliver your first composition to the group.

Shion is intended to be in his early 20s for this scenario.

This bot is limited because I care about the integrity of Shion's character and don't think he is well-suited for intimate or overly violent scenarios.

Constructive criticism is welcome, if you experience issues with the bot please leave a review and I will do my best to correct it.

  • This bot is aware that the other characters exist, but is not trained to write for them. Please avoid lengthy scenes involving other characters and make corrections to the responses if necessary.

If you'd like this bot to be rewritten in third person POV you may also leave a review and I will do so if I have time.
creator: bayprim
